question: What kind of power source is used by the ancient constructs found in the Desert of Bones?

answers.original:
The ancient constructs found in the Desert of Bones, known as War Golems, are powered by Animus Cores.

### References

- [1] War Golems are ancient constructs unearthed in the Desert of Bones, powered by Animus Cores and capable of limited function.
answers.perturbed:
The War Golems, ancient constructs found in the Desert of Bones, are powered by the energy of the Long-Lost Empire.

### References

- [1] Document Title One

entities.name: Desert Ruins
entities.description: The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was discovered, belonging to a forgotten civilization.<SEP>The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was recently discovered.

entities.name: Desert of Bones
entities.description: The Desert of Bones is a harsh and desolate region known for its shifting sands and sandstorms.<SEP>The Desert of Bones is a desolate area where ancient War Golems have been unearthed from shifting sands.

entities.name: Forgotten Civilization
entities.description: The Forgotten Civilization is the group that created the Chrono-Regulator and the desert ruins.

entities.name: Long-Lost Empire
entities.description: The Long-Lost Empire is the creator of the War Golems.

entities.name: War Golems
entities.description: War Golems are ancient constructs unearthed from the Desert of Bones, capable of limited function, and originally designed for defense.<SEP>War Golems are ancient constructs unearthed in the Desert of Bones, powered by Animus Cores and capable of limited function.

relations.description: The Long-Lost Empire is associated with the Desert of Bones, where their creations, the War Golems, were unearthed.
War Golems have been unearthed from the shifting sands of the Desert of Bones.<SEP>The Desert of Bones is where War Golems have been unearthed from shifting sands.
The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.
The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
